hooks.command: node -e "try{const i=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8'));const p=(i.tool_input||{}).file_path||'';if(p.replace(/\\/g,'/').match(/supabase\/.+\.sql$/)&&!p.includes('setup.sql')&&!p.includes('.down.sql'))console.log('HOOK: Nezabudni aktualizovať supabase/setup.sql v tom istom PR!');}catch(e){}"
node -e "console.log('Tip: npm run lint | npm test');"
